text:
TWO-lives is the 2nd track on the original soundtrack of the film Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa. It is also the 5th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title, T(he)W(eight)O(f)-lives, is a reference to the track TheWeightOfLives. "TWO" also references the fact it's for the 2nd recap film.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of 2Volt (without the descending piano notes at 1:19-1:45).
